page_content:
Category: Prestige Info
Topic/Item: Prestige Overview
Information:
- Titan Serum/Mastery, Families, Perk Levels, and all inventory items are kept after Prestiging.
- You gain a Memory ([https://trello.com/c/rc2jweGL/129-memory-system](https://trello.com/c/rc2jweGL/129-memory-system)) after every Prestige, which is an additional passive buff (you start with 0).
- You do NOT need a [https://trello.com/c/DGxOAV4N/132-prestige-scroll](https://trello.com/c/DGxOAV4N/132-prestige-scroll)  in order to Prestige, you just need to max out your level. **Prestige Scrolls are only used for rerolling Memories.**
- Streak is kept after Prestiging.
- The best permanent boost (for most players) is Luck.
- You can not change your permanent boost (Gold/EXP/Luck) after it has been selected.
- Having multiple of the same Memory does not do anything special (they don’t stack)

Prestige Consequences:
`-`Level resets
`-`Skill tree resets
`-`ODM Grade resets

Prestige Buffs:
`+`Memory (special passive that can be rerolled with [https://trello.com/c/DGxOAV4N/132-prestige-scroll](https://trello.com/c/DGxOAV4N/132-prestige-scroll))
`+`7.5% Luck OR 15.0% Exp OR 15.0% Gold (player’s choice)
`+`10 gems added to your payouts in the [https://trello.com/c/9HOPWLiI/56-afk-zone-rewards](https://trello.com/c/9HOPWLiI/56-afk-zone-rewards)
`+`You get an additional 0.005% for Legendary Families per Prestige (buff does not get multiplied by X2 Family).
`+`Level cap increases by 25
(Prestige 1 = 125, Prestige 2 = 150, Prestige 3 = 175, Prestige 4 = 200, Prestige 5 = 225)
`+`Gold gets converted into Gems at a ratio of 1,000 gold per 1 gem, but is capped at 200,000,000 Gold multiplied by the Prestige you are ascending to (Prestige 1’s cap is 200,000,000, Prestige 2’s is 400,000,000, etc.)

Category: Prestige Info
Topic/Item: Prestige
Information:
## Requirements:

1,952,500 EXP required to max out Prestige 0 (Unlocks character slot B)

3,429,553 EXP required to max out Prestige 1 (Unlocks character slot C)

5,265,320 EXP required  to max out Prestige 2

7,334,070 EXP required to max out Prestige 3

9,504,975 EXP required to max out Prestige 4

11,673,242 EXP required to max out Prestige 5

## Rewards:

[https://trello.com/c/rc2jweGL](https://trello.com/c/rc2jweGL)

### Boosts of choice:

+7.5% Luck / +15% Exp / +15% Gold

Category: Prestige Info
Topic/Item: Memory System
Information:
Every time you Prestige, you unlock 1 Memory slot.

You can access your Memories by following the path Play>Equipment>Prestige

You can re-roll one of your Memories at any time using a[https://trello.com/c/DGxOAV4N/132-prestige-scroll](https://trello.com/c/DGxOAV4N/132-prestige-scroll) from your inventory.

The memories you receive are _highly influenced_ by your current Skill Tree path. For example, if you only have points in the Support Skill Tree, you will receive mostly Support Memories.

**The chances to roll memories are as follows:**

- **1 Star** ☆: 70%
- **2 Star** ☆☆: 25%
- **3 Star** ☆☆☆: 4%
- **4 Star** ☆☆☆☆: 1%

**There is a pity of 20 scrolls to receive only 3+ Star Memories. This pity resets every time a 3+ Star is rolled.**

Memories **DO NOT stack.** Having multiple of the same Memory does not give extra buffs.

You can also store 1 Memory to free up the slot it was in for something else without re-rolling it, and gain an extra slot of storage at Prestige 3 and Prestige 5. Additionally, you can store 3 more (for a total of 7) with the [https://trello.com/c/rna8aHA7/320-memory-bag](https://trello.com/c/rna8aHA7/320-memory-bag) gamepass.

**There are 3 types of Memories:**

---

[https://trello.com/c/kT2wg7n5/128-offense-memories](https://trello.com/c/kT2wg7n5/128-offense-memories)

---

[https://trello.com/c/5IMHLbQO/131-defense-memories](https://trello.com/c/5IMHLbQO/131-defense-memories)

---

[https://trello.com/c/bjUb7fJR/130-support-memories](https://trello.com/c/bjUb7fJR/130-support-memories)

---

Category: Prestige Info
Topic/Item: Memory Types
Information:
No additional details provided.

Category: Prestige Info
Topic/Item: Offense Memories
Information:
**4 Stars** ☆☆☆☆

`>` Gambler - All DMG dealt fluctuates between 75.0% - 130.0% (Perfect Form makes this 85.0% - 140.0%)
`>` Overslash - 30.0% of any excess DMG from a finishing blow applies to other titans in a 125m radius (4s CD)
`>` Afterimages - Spear explosions create a smaller explosion in their wake, doing 40.0% DMG (4s CD)

###### NOTE: Afterimages also apply to the explosions generated by [https://trello.com/c/Ub9VkBaz/343-undying-hero?search_id=a9f9d908-3eb5-4f55-b0f0-55cfe78e6a8d](https://trello.com/c/Ub9VkBaz/343-undying-hero?search_id=a9f9d908-3eb5-4f55-b0f0-55cfe78e6a8d)and [https://trello.com/c/a6S0aKYN/346-kingslayer](https://trello.com/c/a6S0aKYN/346-kingslayer)

‌

**3 Stars** ☆☆☆
`>` Quakestrike - Each kill buffs Damage by 1.5%, resets after reloading blades.
- Note - Has a 20 kill limit, capping at 30% damage. Also resets after shifting/ejecting or resupplying with thunderspears.
`>` Furyforge - Buffs Damage by 0.4% for every 1% of Health lost.
`>` Assassin - Blade skills deal 25.0% more DMG and have +15.0% SKILL CD REDUCTION
`>` Amputation - Critical hits dealt to non-boss type titans' limbs disables limb regeneration
`>` Marksman- Increase DMG by 0.4% for each 7.5m traveled per spear (Max 465m)

**2 Stars** ☆☆
`>` Stalwart - Blade Durability increases by 3% for every broken segment
`>` Stormcharged - DMG increases by 3.0% for each shifter present in a match

‌

**1 Star** ☆
`>` Crescendo - Deal 20% more Damage to stunned titans
`>` Blitzblade - Holding down M1 increases your total Damage
`>` Swiftshot - Refilling is 25% faster
`>` Surgeshot - Holding your Spear’s M1 for longer increases the BLAST RADIUS

Category: Prestige Info
Topic/Item: Support Memories
Information:
**4 Stars** ☆☆☆☆
`>` Apotheosis - Awakening Bar fills 15.0% faster, can shift at 60.0% bar, and +1.25% DMG per 10.0% of Awakening Bar filled
- Note: The damage increase applies to both shifter _and_ ODM/TS, as long as you have an Awakening (or Rage) Bar
`>`  Bloodthief - Being hooked onto a titan recovers 3.0% HEALTH every 2s

**3 Stars** ☆☆☆
`>` Omnirange - Ranged skills now affect every player on the map, regardless of range
`>` Flashstep -  Flips/Dashes now have I-Frames
`>` Tactician - All support skills have +15.0% to their effects (Buffs, Duration and Radius)
- Note: Flares, orders, Command, and Founder’s Order are all included

**2 Stars** ☆☆

`>` Vitalize -  Saving a teammate Heals both of you for 10% HP and boosts each of your next attack’s Damage by 25%
`>` Lifefeed - Killing a titan heals you for 2.0% of your HP
`>` Gem Fiend - Obtain +10.0% more Gems from AFK Zone/Mission Streak
- Note: This memory does stack with other sources, such as Fritz’s extra gem passive, but _not_ copies of itself.

**1 Star** ☆
`>` Cooldown Blitz - Skill Cooldown Reduction increases by 10%
`>` Mendmaster - Gain 1 extra bandage each time you refill your gas and blades

Category: Prestige Info
Topic/Item: Defense Memories
Information:
**4 Stars** ☆☆☆☆

`>` Necromantic - Upon ignoring death, gain +20.0% DMG, +25.0% HEALTH and +15.0% SPEED
- Note: This memory does NOT grant you a revive and is only usable with the ‘Resilience' memory mentioned below or family clans that allow you to revive ie. Fritz/Yeager
`>` Thanatophobia - When below 40.0% HEALTH, gain +25.0% DMG REDUCTION, +15.0% INJURY CHANCE REDUCTION and heal an injury every 15s.

**3 Stars** ☆☆☆
`>` Resilience - Ignore up to 1 killing blow per match
`>` Vengeflare - Reflect 50% of incoming damage for 20 seconds while [Tough As Nails ](https://trello.com/c/pUM9p3YW/107-tough-as-nails "‌")is active
`>` Steel Frame- All explosions deal 25.0% less self DMG and grant immunity to any explosions for 5s

**2 Stars** ☆☆
`>` Aegisurge - Gain a temporary shield that has 15% of your HP for 20 seconds after killing a titan
\*For shifter form, Aegisurge only gives a temporary shield for 5% of your HP.
`>` Riposte - Successful counters instantly execute a titan

**1 Star** ☆
`>` Guardian - Ignore 2 injuries per match
`>` Deflectra - 5% chance to completely ignore incoming damage
